prestazioni: MAHLE Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR) for the 4.0L MA1.76 (9A2) naturally aspirated flat-six, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods and ARP L19 head studs for 8,500 RPM reliability in endurance racing

Motec M150 ECU with custom 3D-printed intake manifold (Porsche Motorsport-approved) featuring individual throttle bodies (ITBs) and a K&N carbon-fiber velocity stack system, optimized for 480+ HP on VP Racing C16 102-octane fuel

Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts, paired with a Tillet B12 lightweight carbon seat and Schroth 6-point harness for GT3-level chassis rigidity, including a custom 917-style rear sway bar (28mm adjustable) from Manthey Racing
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Porsche 981C-specific) with carbon-fiber overfenders, front splitter, and GT3-spec rear diffuser, finished in 911 R-style 'Gulf Blue' with matte gold accents (PPG custom mix)
BBS FI-R 18x12 ET40 (front) and 18x13 ET45 (rear) forged wheels with titanium lug bolts, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/645R18 front, 325/705R18 rear) for track-focused stagger

Recaro SPG XL carbon-kevlar seats with custom embroidered 'GT4 CS' headrests in Alcantara (Stealth Grey), paired with a MOMO Prototipo Evo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom titanium shift knob (911 GT3 RS-style) from 935 Motorsports
